nasb.text: “Awake, O sword, against My Shepherd, And against the man, My Associate,” Declares the Lord of hosts. “Strike the Shepherd that the sheep may be scattered; And I will turn My hand against the little ones.

esv.text: “Awake, O sword, against my shepherd, against the man who stands next to me,” declares the Lord of hosts. “Strike the shepherd, and the sheep will be scattered; I will turn my hand against the little ones.

cnv.text: “刀劍哪，醒來吧！攻擊我的牧人，我的同伴， 要擊打牧人，羊群就分散； 我也要轉過手來，攻擊小羊。

ccb.text: 万军之耶和华说： “刀剑啊，醒来吧， 要攻击我的牧人和同伴， 要击打牧人，羊群将四散， 我必出手攻击小羊。
